title: stelis tsubotae
intro: Stelis tsubotae, also known as the Japanese stelis, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis tsubotae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving infusions of the leaves and flowers.
